statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); branch=$(cd "$cwd" && git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); git_dirty=$(cd "$cwd" && git diff --quiet 2>/dev/null || echo '*'); git_status=""; if [ -n "$branch" ]; then if [ -n "$git_dirty" ]; then git_status=$(printf '\033[33m')\ git:\ \(${branch}${git_dirty}\)$(printf '\033[0m'); else git_status=$(printf '\033[32m')\ git:\ \(${branch}\)$(printf '\033[0m'); fi; fi; printf '\033[36m%s\033[0m%s' "$(basename "$cwd")" "$git_status"
